def negative_python_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_attribute_lookup_in_deep_inner_loop():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_attribute_lookup_in_deep_inner_loop"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Hot path optimization. Flag repeated dynamic getattr or attribute lookup in deep loops where local binding helps."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
